rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type or implementation annexes as appropriate
Use 'assume' for input assumptions and 'guarantee' for output guarantees
Place 'assign' statements only in implementation annexes when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or auxiliary variable
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
generic_rules: Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Use exact current-case names from the model index for AGREE expressions
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside 'annex agree {** ... **};' blocks
Use 'eq name : type = expression;' for equations and 'const name : type = value;' for constants
For implementation contracts, use 'assign output = expression;' only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or auxiliary variable
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
